data.title: Manus AI Integrates Anthropic's Agent Skills Open Standard
data.description: Manus AI has announced the integration of Anthropic's Agent Skills open standard. According to Foresight News, Agent Skills is an innovative approach that packages expertise, workflows, and best practices into reusable, file system-based resources. Manus stated that within the Manus AI ecosystem, Skill and MCP (Model Context Protocol) are two technologies with different objectives but complementary capabilities.

data.title: A whale with 5x leverage went long on HYPE and made a floating profit of $13.03 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, HYPE rose from $22 to $33 in the past day. Whale Laurent Zeimes (0x8def...2dae) opened a long position of 1.227 million HYPE tokens with 5x leverage when HYPE was at a low of $22.37, with a position valued at $27.46 million. With the price of HYPE reaching $33, this long position is currently showing a profit of $13.03 million.

data.title: Citi Bank Forecasts Significant Increase in Silver Prices
data.description: Citi Bank has projected that silver prices could rise significantly, reaching $150 per ounce by the end of this year. This prediction comes amid growing interest in precious metals as investors seek safe-haven assets in uncertain economic times. Crypto Rover posted on X, highlighting the bank's optimistic outlook for silver, which is currently trading at much lower levels. The forecast suggests a potential surge in demand driven by factors such as inflation concerns and geopolitical tensions, which could contribute to the upward trend in silver prices. Investors and market analysts are closely monitoring these developments, as they could have substantial implications for the commodities market.

data.title: Binance Launches Promotions with 27,500 USDC in Rewards
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is introducing two exclusive promotions aimed at enhancing user engagement with Binance Convert. The promotions, which run from 2026-01-28 00:00 (UTC) to 2026-02-24 23:59 (UTC), offer a total of 27,500 USDC in token vouchers to eligible participants.

**Promotion A: Accumulate BTC and Share 25,000 USDC**

During the promotion period, users who register via the landing page and accumulate Bitcoin through Binance Convert can participate in Promotion A. Each week, the top 500 users with the highest BTC accumulation will share a reward pool of 5,000 USDC, with a cap of 10 USDC per user. Additionally, a bonus task allows winners from weeks 1 to 4, who trade BTC token pairs on at least 14 different days via Convert Recurring, to share an extra 5,000 USDC, also capped at 10 USDC per user.

**Promotion B: First Trade Rewards**

Promotion B targets new Binance Convert users who have not previously used the Convert Recurring feature. The first 500 eligible users who convert at least 25 USDC equivalent of any tokens within the first seven days after their initial deposit will share a 2,500 USDC reward pool, capped at 5 USDC per user.

Participants must register their participation and complete the relevant trades during the promotion period to qualify for rewards. Trades executed outside the specified period or through certain methods, such as API trades or stablecoin conversions, will not count. Binance reserves the right to disqualify any participants engaging in prohibited activities, such as wash trading or market manipulation. Rewards will be distributed within two weeks after the promotion ends, and users must claim their vouchers within 60 days of distribution.

data.title: Ethereum Wallets Reach Record High Amid Staking Interest
data.description: Santiment posted on X that the number of non-empty Ethereum wallets has surged to over 175.5 million, marking a record among all cryptocurrencies. This increase comes as staking remains a popular activity, particularly during periods of market stagnation. Consequently, the supply of Ethereum on exchanges is expected to decrease as more users engage in staking activities.

data.title: Rodeo, a social NFT platform, has announced its closure, becoming the second NFT platform to shut down within a week.
data.description: Social NFT platform Rodeo has announced its closure, becoming the second NFT platform to do so this week. Rodeo CEO and co-founder Kayvon Tehranian stated that despite positive feedback from its core community, the platform failed to achieve the scale required for sustainability, making continued operation unfeasible. Launched on iOS in March 2025, Rodeo focused on a social NFT collecting experience, emphasizing rewards for content creation rather than simple trading. The platform will maintain normal functionality from January 27th to February 10th, then enter read-only mode, and will completely shut down on March 10th. The platform will assist users in migrating their assets and data to Arweave and provide guidance on contract asset migration. Additionally, Tehranian announced that ownership of his NFT art platform, Foundation, will be transferred to Blackdove. At the market level, the NFT industry has been sluggish since its peak in 2022, with monthly Ethereum NFT transaction volume falling from nearly $5 billion at the beginning of 2022 to approximately $159 million in January 2026. Meanwhile, Nifty Gateway has updated its shutdown plan, extending the user asset migration deadline to April 23.

data.title: The US XRP spot ETF saw a net inflow of $9.16 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, XRP spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $9.16 million yesterday (January 27th, Eastern Time). The XRP spot ETF with the largest net inflow yesterday (January 27th, Eastern Time) was the Bitwise XRP ETF (XRP), with a single-day net inflow of $7.08 million and a historical total net inflow of $332 million. This was followed by the Franklin XRP ETF (XRPZ), with a single-day net inflow of $2.08 million and a historical total net inflow of $296 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of XRP spot ETFs was $1.38 billion, with an XRP net asset ratio of 1.18%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $1.25 billion.

data.title: USD1: A Political Drama Unfolds
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter). USD1 is no longer just a stablecoin story; it has evolved into a political theater. The developments surrounding USD1, including surpassing PYUSD, Binance pulling liquidity, the involvement of Pakistan's central bank, and the application for an OCC license, all point to it being a digital dollar project associated with the Trump family. Its future trajectory depends on the occupant of the White House.

data.title: South Korea to Mandate Cryptocurrency Disclosure for Homebuyers in Regulated Areas
data.description: South Korea is set to implement a new regulation requiring homebuyers in specific regulated regions, including Seoul, to disclose proceeds from cryptocurrency sales when submitting capital procurement plans. According to NS3.AI, the Korea Real Estate Board is in the process of finalizing system updates to enforce this requirement. The amendment to the Transaction Reporting Act is awaiting Cabinet approval and will be enforced immediately upon approval, with no grace period provided.

data.title: Bitwise Advisor Highlights Age Disparity Between Silver and Bitcoin Investors
data.description: Bitwise Invest advisor and investor Jeff Park expressed his views on the age demographics of silver and Bitcoin investors. According to Odaily, Park speculated that the average age of silver investors might be lower than that of Bitcoin investors, which he believes is a significant issue.

data.title: John (Lick) Linked to Major Theft Case Involving Over $90 Million
data.description: John (Lick) has been implicated in a significant theft case involving the misappropriation of over $90 million from a U.S. government-seized address, according to PANews. The case also includes a series of thefts targeting several unidentified victims between November and December 2025. Monitoring has revealed that John (Lick) has begun depositing funds into Tornado Cash, with a total of 11,037 ETH transferred to the mixer so far.

data.title: A whale withdrew 1,000 BTC from OKX, worth $89.2 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, in the past 17 hours, a whale (bc1qwu...7qm4l) withdrew 1,000 BTC from OKX, worth $89.2 million.

data.title: Nvidia Invests $2 Billion in CoreWeave to Boost U.S. Data Center Expansion
data.description:
Nvidia has announced a $2 billion investment in AI infrastructure provider CoreWeave, making it the company's second-largest shareholder. According to PANews, this move aims to accelerate their collaboration on data center construction in the United States. The investment, priced at $87.20 per share, will increase Nvidia's holdings by approximately 23 million shares, significantly boosting its stake in CoreWeave.

CoreWeave plans to use the funds to expedite land and power acquisitions, research and development, and team expansion, rather than purchasing Nvidia processors. The company aims to establish over 5 gigawatts of AI data center capacity by 2030. Originally a cryptocurrency mining firm, CoreWeave has transitioned into a "new cloud" service provider, renting Nvidia GPUs to technology and AI companies.

data.title: Bitwise Invest advisor: Silver investors may be younger on average than Bitcoin investors, and that's the problem.
data.description: Jeff Park, an advisor and investor at Bitwise Invest, wrote that he bets silver investors are likely younger than Bitcoin investors, and that's "the problem."

data.title: Rocket Lab Shares Surge After Key Neutron Rocket Component Delivery
data.description: Rocket Lab's shares rose by more than 8% following the delivery of a crucial component for its Neutron rocket, marking a significant step towards its inaugural flight. According to NS3.AI, the company's stock has shown a robust start to 2026, with a 24% increase year-to-date and a remarkable 195% rise over the past year. Morgan Stanley has upgraded Rocket Lab to overweight, raising its price target from $67 to $105, highlighting the ongoing momentum in the space technology sector.

data.title: Steak 'n Shake Expands Bitcoin Holdings by $5 Million
data.description: Steak 'n Shake announced on the X platform that its transition from burgers to Bitcoin is ongoing. According to Odaily, the company's Bitcoin holdings have increased by $5 million in nominal value today. All revenue from Bitcoin sales is directed into its Strategic Bitcoin Reserve (SBR). The company's self-sustaining system enhances food quality to boost same-store sales, thereby increasing the strategic Bitcoin reserve, and is transforming the chain business through financial technology. Steak 'n Shake is a subsidiary of Biglari Holdings.

data.title: USD.AI establishes foundation and plans to launch governance token CHIP.
data.description: USD.AI, a stablecoin protocol that provides credit support for AI, announced the establishment of the USD.AI Foundation and plans to launch its governance token, CHIP. According to the official disclosure, CHIP will be issued via ICO, airdrop, and TGE after the Allo Game points program concludes in the first quarter of 2026. Specific ICO venues will be announced later.

data.title: DefiLlama acquires OTC data platform Bulletin to supplement valuation data for private crypto companies.
data.description: Blockchain data aggregation platform DefiLlama has completed its acquisition of over-the-counter (OTC) data provider Bulletin. This move will enable DefiLlama to provide users with more granular secondary market valuation data for private crypto companies. Patrick Scott, Head of Revenue and Growth at DefiLlama, stated that Bulletin's OTC buy and sell quotes and transaction information will complement DefiLlama's existing crypto startup funding data, helping the market better understand the true valuation range of private crypto companies. 0xngmi, head of DefiLlama, pointed out that this is the platform's first acquisition since its inception, and although the volume of new data is limited, it introduces proprietary data that was not previously available. David Mirzadeh, founder of Bulletin and Chief of Staff of the NEAR Foundation, founded the platform in 2023, focusing on aggregating OTC quotes and transaction information for private company equity and tokens. He stated that the private market is highly opaque, and "even a single buy or sell quote is extremely valuable." It is understood that Bulletin's OTC data and some of DefiLlama's advanced analytics tools will continue to be offered as LlamaPro subscription content, and Mirzadeh will assist DefiLlama in expanding its OTC data sources as an advisor. (DL news)

data.title: Bitmine has staked another 113,300 ETH, bringing its total staked amount to approximately 2,266,000 ETH.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, Bitmine (@BitMNR) has staked an additional 113,280 ETH, worth approximately $341 million. As of now, Bitmine's total staked ETH has increased to 2,265,984, valued at approximately $6.82 billion at current prices.

data.title: Ethereum to Launch ERC-8004 Standard on Mainnet
data.description: Ethereum has officially announced the upcoming launch of the ERC-8004 standard on its mainnet. According to ChainCatcher, this new standard will enable AI agents to interact across various organizations by implementing a discovery mechanism and portable reputation. This development aims to facilitate the flow of reputation globally, paving the way for an interoperable market for AI services.
